title: Moosend vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend vs Constant Contact. See pricing, features, ratings & find the best email marketing tool for your business needs.
h1: Moosend vs Constant Contact: Complete Comparison
intro: Moosend and Constant Contact are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Moosend emphasizes affordability and unlimited sending with a freemium model, while Constant Contact focuses on integrated marketing tools for nonprofits and local businesses. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your budget and feature requirements.

comparison_table.tool_a: Automation, landing pages, A/B testing, real-time analytics
comparison_table.tool_b: Social media ads, SMS, event management, e-commerce tools

choose_a_if: You want to start for free with no subscriber limits on sending
You need powerful automation workflows and A/B testing capabilities
You prefer affordable pricing and don't need advanced e-commerce features
choose_b_if: You need integrated e-commerce, event management, or SMS marketing
You run a nonprofit or local business that benefits from social media ad tools
You prefer a single platform with broader integrated marketing features

faq.q: Is Moosend better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Moosend excels in affordability and automation with higher user satisfaction ratings (4.7 vs 4.0 on G2). However, Constant Contact offers broader integrated marketing tools including e-commerce, SMS, and event management that may benefit businesses needing a more comprehensive solution.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, with a free tier supporting up to 1,000 subscribers and unlimited emails. Constant Contact has no free option and starts at $12/month. For cost-conscious businesses, Moosend is the clear winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list imports, making migration straightforward. You can export your contacts from Constant Contact and import them into Moosend. However, campaign history and templates will need to be recreated manually in most cases.
